seo.title: Headwear Styling – AI Hat Model Photography | OpenCreator
seo.description: Create professional headwear styling photos with AI. Generate model images wearing hats, caps, and headwear from multiple angles using Nano Banana Pro—perfect for hat brands and fashion e-commerce.

hero.title: Headwear Styling
hero.description: Create professional headwear styling photos with AI. Upload your model photo, clothing, and hat—Nano Banana Pro combines them into multiple professional poses showcasing your headwear from different angles. Perfect for hat brands and fashion retailers who need high-quality model photography.

steps.title: Upload model, clothing, and hat images
steps.description: Provide a base model photo, the outfit you want them wearing, and the hat or headwear product. The AI will combine them naturally while maintaining consistency.

steps.title: Generate dressed model with outfit
steps.description: Nano Banana Pro first creates the model wearing your specified clothing, ensuring a natural fit and proper proportions before adding the headwear.

steps.title: AI creates pose variations
steps.description: Gemini 3 Pro generates 4 professional pose descriptions optimized for showcasing headwear—including front view, side profile, and close-up angles.

steps.title: Generate multi-angle headwear photos
steps.description: The workflow produces 4 high-quality images with the model wearing your hat from different angles, perfectly styled and naturally positioned for maximum visual appeal.

whoIsFor.title: Built for headwear brands and fashion retailers
whoIsFor.subtitle: From hat designers to fashion e-commerce stores, see who creates headwear photos with AI.

items.question: What is the Headwear Styling workflow?
items.answer: This AI-powered workflow creates professional model photography showcasing hats and headwear. It combines your model photo with clothing and hat images to generate 4 different poses from various angles, optimized for headwear display.

items.question: What AI models power this workflow?
items.answer: The workflow uses Nano Banana Pro for image generation and realistic model-hat combinations, and Gemini 3 Pro to generate professional pose descriptions specifically designed for headwear showcase photography.

items.question: What images do I need to provide?
items.answer: You need three images: a base model photo, an outfit/clothing image, and a hat or headwear product image. The AI combines them naturally while maintaining proper proportions.

items.question: How many photos does the workflow generate?
items.answer: The workflow generates 4 different model poses showcasing your headwear from various angles—including front view, side profiles, and close-ups that highlight the hat's design details.

items.question: Will the hat look naturally positioned on the model?
items.answer: Yes. Nano Banana Pro specializes in realistic product placement. The hat will be properly sized, angled naturally (like tilted styling), and positioned correctly on the model's head.

items.question: Can I showcase different hat styles?
items.answer: Absolutely. The workflow works with any headwear type—baseball caps, beanies, fedoras, bucket hats, visors, and more. Just provide your product image and the AI adapts accordingly.

items.question: Can I use different models for brand diversity?
items.answer: Yes. You can run the workflow with different base model images to create diverse representation for your brand or match your target customer demographics.

items.question: How does pricing work for this workflow?
items.answer: Credits are consumed based on the AI models used. The workflow leverages Nano Banana Pro (50% discount) for image generation, making it cost-effective for headwear brands.
